subtitle: Manage installations, team access, and platform settings.

customerOverview.title: Overview
customerOverview.subtitle: Your company's Aipify modules, installations, and team — scoped to your organization only.
customerOverview.installFirstNote: Daily companion work happens inside your installed systems. This Control Center is for configuration, installs, and team management.

modules.install: Connect and monitor your Aipify installation.
modules.support: Aipify Support configuration and ticket insights.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Executive summaries and recommended actions for your business.
assistant.description: Din Aipify-assistent övervakar installationer, support, fakturering och affärssignaler — och visar bara det som betyder något.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Configure Aipify Support and review handled tickets.
support.description: Support-AI svarar automatiskt på vanliga kundfrågor och eskalerar viktiga ärenden när det behövs.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track performance and business insights.
analytics.description: Aipify Analytics identifierar trender, möjligheter och viktiga förändringar i ditt företag.

commerce.title: Commerce
commerce.subtitle: Aipify Commerce tools and sales intelligence.
commerce.description: Commerce-AI optimerar produkter, prissättning och lönsamhet.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Manage alerts and notification channels.
notifications.description: Hantera aviseringar från installationer, fakturering, integrationer och AI-rekommendationer.

controlCenter.title: Control Center
controlCenter.subtitle: Install-first hub for provisioning, billing, and team management — not daily operations.
controlCenter.installFirstNote: Daily companion work happens inside your installed systems. Use this dashboard to provision installs and manage your Aipify account.

installs.title: Installations
installs.description: Create tokens and connect WordPress, Shopify, or custom systems.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: View your plan, trial, payment status, and invoices.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage who can access your Control Center and installations.
team.comingSoon: Team invites and role management will be available in a future release.

billing.title: Billing & subscription
billing.subtitle: Your Aipify plan, trial period, payment status, and invoices.
billing.cancelPlaceholder: Cancellation will be available in a future release. Your data is retained.

assistant.title: Aipify Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Aipify övervakar ditt företag tyst i bakgrunden.

learning.title: Inlärningsfas
learning.subtitle: Övervakad observationsperiod innan full automatisering.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Visa, konfigurera och övervaka skills tillgängliga för din organisation.
skills.principle: Varje Skill begär endast de behörigheter den behöver. Nya behörigheter kräver godkännande.

available.title: Tillgängliga skills
